response.justification: Highly experienced full-stack engineer (15+ years, well above the 6+ requirement) currently at Google working on TypeScript/Node.js plus AI-agent infrastructure including MCP — a near-perfect match for the role's primary stack and AI-agent requirement. Strong testing culture (TDD practitioner, authored D test runner and assertion library), prior React/TypeScript/MongoDB/AWS work at Meta, and clean engineering practices at RIDE Capital. Gaps are minor (no explicit Nest.js or Vitest, Java rather than Kotlin) and easily covered in interview; resume has some odd overlaps (concurrent 'Founder, Amazon' entry running alongside other full-time roles) worth clarifying.
strengths: Current Google role covers TypeScript/Node.js full-stack plus AI-agent/MCP work — directly matches stack and AI requirement
Deep testing discipline: TDD advocate, built D-language test runner (Trial) and assertion lib (Fluent-Asserts), taught Selenium/TDD courses
Broad polyglot backend/frontend experience (TS, Java, D, Node, React, GraphQL, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes) with 15+ years across product and infra
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed (has Node.js and general testing, but framework-specific exposure unclear)
Has Java but no Kotlin mentioned — secondary stack gap
Overlapping 'Founder, Amazon, Berlin (2016–Present)' entry runs concurrent with Meta/RIDE/Dunnhumby full-time roles; ambiguous titling needs clarification

key_factors.factor: AI agent / MCP experience at Google
Full-stack TS/Node.js/React seniority well beyond 6+ years
